name: Sphinx Trading
description_short: Sphinx Trading operates multiple New Jersey locations offering check cashing at 2% fees, wire transfers via MoneyGram and Western Union, and bill payment services.
description_long:
Sphinx Trading Co. Inc. is a check-cashing and money services business operating across New Jersey with multiple store locations. The company has established itself as a regional financial services provider focused on serving customers who need check cashing, wire transfer, and bill payment solutions. Their main office is located in Jersey City on Kennedy Boulevard, with additional branches on Central Avenue and in Union City. Sphinx Trading positions itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for these core financial services. The company advertises competitive rates and extended operating hours to serve their customer base across the state.

Sphinx Trading's primary service offerings include check cashing with a flat 2% fee, wire money transfers through major providers MoneyGram and Western Union, and bill payment services. Customers can pay telephone bills, electricity bills, credit card payments, and other bills at their store locations. The company emphasizes the availability of these services across all their store locations, allowing customers flexibility in where they conduct transactions. Their website highlights that wire transfers can be sent for any amount, positioning them as a full-service money transfer option.

The company distinguishes itself through competitive check-cashing fees at 2%, extended business hours (some locations open as early as 7am and stay open until 9pm), and a multi-location footprint across New Jersey. They maintain Saturday hours and Sunday hours at most locations, providing weekend access. The integration of MoneyGram and Western Union wire transfer services alongside check cashing creates a one-stop-shop model for customers needing multiple financial services simultaneously.

Sphinx Trading serves a straightforward, limited financial services niche without offering loans, credit products, or digital banking. As a check-cashing operation, the company is best suited for customers who prefer cash-based transactions, need quick check conversion without a bank account, or require wire transfer services. The 2% check-cashing fee is competitive in the industry but still represents a cost compared to free bank check deposits. The company's limitation to physical store locations in New Jersey restricts its accessibility compared to national or digital-first competitors.
pros: Extended business hours including early morning (7am) and late evening (9pm) options at some locations
Multiple convenient store locations across New Jersey (Jersey City, Central Avenue, Union City)
Saturday and Sunday hours available at all locations for weekend transactions
Integration of MoneyGram and Western Union for wire transfers at no minimum amount
Multiple bill payment options (telephone, electricity, credit cards) available in-store
No mention of hidden fees or fine print restrictions on services
cons: 2% check-cashing fee still represents a cost that banks do not charge
Limited geographic footprint restricted to New Jersey only
No online or digital check-cashing option; all services require physical store visit
No website contact information provided (only support@sphinxtrading.net email)
No information about identity verification requirements, check limits, or hold periods
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked New Jersey residents needing quick check conversion
Customers who prefer cash transactions and need same-day access to check funds
Individuals sending or receiving wire transfers via MoneyGram or Western Union
Customers needing to pay multiple bills at a single physical location
diagnosis: Sphinx Trading is best for New Jersey residents who need check cashing, wire transfers, or bill payments and prefer handling these transactions in physical locations rather than through banks or digital services. The main caveat is that while their 2% check-cashing fee is competitive, all services require in-person store visits with no digital alternative, and the service is geographically limited to New Jersey.
services: Early morning opening (7am at Union City location)
Late evening hours (9pm at select locations)
